name: French Fried Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onion into 1/4 inch slices and separate rings.
2. In a 9 x 13 pan, combine onion and milk. Let stand for 30 minutes, turning frequently.
3. On wax paper, combine the next three ingredients: bread crumbs, chili powder (if using), and salt.
4. Turn each onion ring into the bread crumb mixture to coat evenly.
5. Spray a cookie sheet with vegetable oil and place the coated onion rings on the pan.
6. Drizzle evenly with additional vegetable oil.
7. Bake at 450°F for 5 minutes on each side.
Serving size: 1 fat onion ring, 1/2 teaspoon vegetable oil, 1 bread crumb coating, 5 optional calories (from chili powder if used)
